additionalPlanContext: The target Java version to upgrade to is Java 21. Upgrade this Maven WAR project from Java 8 to Java 21 and make it fully runnable on Java 21. It must still run using mvn jetty:run and the UI must load successfully and allow login plus data submission. Current stack: Apache Wicket 7.x, Jetty 9.2.x, Hibernate 5.2.x, MySQL connector 5.1.x. Upgrade strategy: upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to release 21; upgrade to Apache Wicket 9.x only (NOT 10+); upgrade to Jetty 9.4.x only (NOT 10/11/12); upgrade Hibernate to a Java 21 compatible 5.x version; upgrade MySQL connector to 8.x and use com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver; replace outdated JAXB artifacts with Java 21 compatible JAXB dependencies; ensure org.jboss.logging is available at runtime (no provided scope); fix HbContactsEntity composite-id by using a single @Id for idcontact and keeping iduser as a normal column; ensure HbUsersEntity maps correctly to the users table; prefer annotation-based mappings and remove conflicting hbm.xml files if necessary. HARD CONSTRAINTS: DO NOT migrate to Jakarta; DO NOT introduce any jakarta.* imports; keep javax.servlet.* namespace only; DO NOT upgrade to Jetty 10/11/12; DO NOT upgrade to Wicket 10+; DO NOT add jakarta.servlet-api dependency; final pom.xml and source code must contain ZERO references to jakarta.*. Validation rule: If any jakarta.* dependency, import, or plugin appears in output, the transformation is invalid. Goal: Minimal-change Java 21 compatibility while remaining fully on the javax.servlet stack.
